Variables.Name: FocusMethod
Variables.Description: Which method to use to handle camera focus

Variables.Name: ManualFocusDistance
Variables.Description: Manually-controlled focus distance (manual focus mode only)

Variables.Name: TrackingFocusSettings
Variables.Description: Settings to control tracking focus (tracking focus mode only)

Variables.Name: bDrawDebugFocusPlane
Variables.Description: True to draw a translucent plane at the current focus depth, for easy tweaking.

Variables.Name: DebugFocusPlaneColor
Variables.Description: For customizing the focus plane color, in case the default doesn't show up well in your scene.

Variables.Name: bSmoothFocusChanges
Variables.Description: True to use interpolation to smooth out changes in focus distance, false for focus distance changes to be instantaneous.

Variables.Name: FocusSmoothingInterpSpeed
Variables.Description: Controls interpolation speed when smoothing focus distance changes. Ignored if bSmoothFocusChanges is false.

Variables.Name: FocusOffset
Variables.Description: Additional focus depth offset, used for manually tweaking if your chosen focus method needs adjustment
